name: Master ERP
description: Master ERP is a comprehensive business management and financial tracking system built to streamline shifts, inventory, and point-of-sale operations.
features: Robust Shift Management and employee permission structures.
Automatic PDF generation for invoices, receipts, and financial reports.
Offline-first sync capability with high-precision conflict resolution.
my_role: Core Mobile Architect - Designed an offline-first architecture capable of handling large-scale business data while maintaining fast performance. Implemented local database caching, background synchronization, and conflict-resolution mechanisms to ensure data consistency even during unstable internet connectivity.
